title: State configuration file
description: Everything state-specific for one US state. Adding a state to the app means adding one file that validates against this schema — app code never changes. Design decisions: (1) all human-readable text is a localized-string object keyed by BCP-47 tag with en-US required, so new languages never change state files' shape; (2) passing rules use explicit integer minCorrect rather than only a percentage, eliminating rounding ambiguity (Ohio: 15 of 20 per section); (3) sections carry their own question counts and thresholds because several states (like Ohio) score sections independently.

passingRule.description: per-section: every section's minCorrect must be met independently. overall: only the sum matters (sections still organize content).

timeLimitMinutes.description: null means the real test is untimed.

id.description: Stable key questions reference via their 'section' field.

minPermitAge.description: Minimum age in years for a learner permit; fractional ages allowed (Ohio: 15.5).

content.description: How this state's question bank is composed. Omitted entirely for states whose bank is fully self-authored (Ohio).

nationalSigns.description: true: build-questions.mjs stamps the national MUTCD signs pool (data/questions/national-signs.json) into this state's bank with ids rewritten us-signs-NNN -> <code>-signs-NNN. The state's authoring batches then only need to cover state-specific content.

sources.description: Citations backing every fact in this file. Reviewers verify against these.

localizedString.description: Text keyed by BCP-47 language tag. en-US is always required as the fallback language.
